.file-embed.background: rgb(46, 52, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.metadata-container.background: rgba(76, 86, 106, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(46, 52, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(59, 66, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / 13.2px padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #3B4252 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#3B4252, color-mix(in srgb, #3B4252 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #3B4252 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#3B4252, color-mix(in srgb, #3B4252 65%, transparent))
